items.title: Jira Cloud integration (Labs)
items.description: Connect your Jira Cloud account to sync issues directly into SlayZone. Enable in Settings → Labs.

items.title: Multi-repo projects
items.description: Projects now support multiple repositories with auto-detection.

items.title: Processes panel
items.description: New dedicated panel to monitor and manage running processes.

items.title: Process names on terminal tabs
items.description: Terminal tabs now show the running process name with duplicate numbering.

items.title: File tree refresh
items.description: Added a refresh button to the file editor sidebar.

items.title: Usage bar layout
items.description: Fixed boost pill popover layout and normalized spacer widths.

items.title: Clickable terminal links
items.description: URLs and file paths in terminals are now clickable — Cmd+Click opens files, Cmd+Shift+Click opens in default app.

items.title: Worktree sync & merge
items.description: New sync dropdown with merge-to-parent and use-existing-branch options.

items.title: Fullscreen task descriptions
items.description: Task descriptions open in a distraction-free fullscreen dialog.

items.title: Process stats
items.description: Active terminals and processes now show CPU, memory, duration, and restart count.

items.title: Sidebar reorganized
items.description: Leaderboard and usage buttons moved to the sidebar footer for cleaner navigation.

items.title: Drag to empty groups
items.description: Tasks can now be dropped into empty list-view groups.

items.title: Browser logins
items.description: CAPTCHAs and OAuth popups now work reliably in the browser panel.

items.title: Worktree file copying
items.description: Creating worktrees no longer freezes the UI, and junk files are excluded.

items.title: Diverged branch graph
items.description: Commit graph now correctly renders diverged local/remote branches.

items.title: Integrations in beta
items.description: Sync tasks with Linear and GitHub from one place, with easy discovery of unlinked tasks.

items.title: Git panel settings
items.description: Customize commit graph defaults and save display preferences per project.

items.title: Faster app startup
items.description: The app loads significantly faster thanks to smaller bundles and smarter loading.

items.title: Smoother board loading
items.description: Kanban boards now load in a single step instead of multiple sequential fetches.

items.title: Snappier commit graph
items.description: Commit graph handles large repos much better with less memory usage.

items.title: Faster terminal rendering
items.description: Terminals feel more responsive with hardware-accelerated rendering and reduced overhead.

items.title: Commit graph display
items.description: Fixed various visual glitches in the commit graph layout.

items.title: Terminal reconnection
items.description: Switching back to a terminal no longer replays its entire history.

items.title: Sync reliability
items.description: Tasks now properly archive when deleted or archived in Linear/GitHub.

items.title: In-app feedback dialog
items.description: Send feedback directly from the app with Discord forum integration.

items.title: Full-file diff toggle
items.description: View entire files in the diff viewer instead of just changed hunks.

items.title: Process stop action
items.description: Stop running processes directly from the process panel.

items.title: Configurable commit graph
items.description: Branch-focused commit graph with legend, tooltips, and tag support.

items.title: Leaderboard
items.description: Track AI coding agent activity across tasks.

items.title: Git-ignored file copying
items.description: Automatically copy git-ignored files when creating worktrees, configurable per project.

items.title: Persistent home panel state
items.description: Home panel visibility and git tab selection saved per project.

items.title: Active tab styling
items.description: Active task tab is now more visually prominent.

items.title: Scrollable sidebar
items.description: Project list in sidebar now scrolls when overflowing.

items.title: Terminal bottom clipping
items.description: Fixed bottom content being clipped by FitAddon padding mismatch.

items.title: Shell startup flags
items.description: Removed persisted shell override that caused incorrect startup flags.

items.title: Webview surface clipping
items.description: Fixed browser panel clipping under CSS transforms.

items.title: Pull request dashboard
items.description: Full PR tab with create/link, merge controls, diff view, comments timeline, and mermaid diagrams.

items.title: Branch & worktree graph
items.description: Visual branch/worktree tabs with graph view, actions, and PR status at a glance.

items.title: Worktree tab grouping
items.description: Task tabs grouped by worktree with colored borders for quick identification.

items.title: Git push/pull controls
items.description: Push and pull directly from the git panel with remote URL display.

items.title: Configurable rate-limit bars
items.description: Customize usage bars with support for custom providers.

items.title: Per-view panel toggles
items.description: Configure which panels show on home vs task views independently.

items.title: Main-thread freezes eliminated
items.description: Git and GitHub CLI operations no longer block the UI.

items.title: Layout shift on tab switch
items.description: Fixed xterm scrollbar leak and layout jump when switching tabs.

items.title: Terminal theme picker
items.description: Choose from 16 curated terminal color themes.

items.title: Database backups
items.description: Automatic SQLite database backup system to protect your data.

items.title: Interactive CLI prompts fixed
items.description: Sync query responses and OSC filtering fix broken interactive prompts.

items.title: Copy/paste on Linux & Windows
items.description: Ctrl+Shift+C/V now works for terminal copy/paste on non-macOS.

items.title: Usage rate limiting
items.description: Added caching and 429 backoff to prevent API rate limiting.

items.title: Custom AI providers
items.description: Add any AI CLI as a terminal mode with custom commands, flags, and settings.

items.title: Getting started checklist
items.description: New onboarding checklist guides you through initial setup step by step.

items.title: Worktrees management panel
items.description: Create, switch, and delete git worktrees from a dedicated panel in the kanban view.

items.title: Terminal focus on tab switch
items.description: Switching task tabs now auto-focuses the terminal — no extra click needed.

items.title: Unknown terminal modes handled
items.description: Tasks with unrecognized terminal modes no longer crash the UI.

items.title: Terminal reinit on save
items.description: Saving a conversation ID no longer restarts the terminal session.

items.title: Per-panel settings
items.description: Configure editor, diff, terminal, and browser panels individually from a dedicated settings page.

items.title: Drill-down settings navigation
items.description: Settings now use a drill-down layout — less clutter, easier discovery.

items.title: Dark mode text selection
items.description: Selected text is now visible in dark mode.

items.title: Claude Code Switch integration
items.description: Claude Code Switch integrated into the profile dropdown for quick access.

items.title: Execution contexts
items.description: Run tasks on your host, in Docker containers, or over SSH — configurable per project.

items.title: Undo stale snapshot
items.description: Undoing task completion no longer uses a stale task snapshot.

items.title: Task processes cleaned up on archive
items.description: Archiving or purging a task now kills its background processes, not just terminals.

items.title: Light & dark theme selector
items.description: Choose between light, dark, or system theme from settings — light mode fully polished.

items.title: Undo/redo for task mutations
items.description: Accidentally moved a task? Undo and redo any task change instantly.

items.title: Worktree setup scripts
items.description: Drop a .slay/worktree-setup.sh in your project — it runs automatically when creating worktrees.

items.title: Task settings panel header
items.description: Settings panel now matches the consistent header style of other panels.

items.title: Codex session detection
items.description: Codex session IDs are now auto-detected from disk instead of requiring manual entry.

items.title: Git error messages cleaned up
items.description: Worktree git errors no longer show the "Command failed" prefix.

items.title: Custom task status workflows
items.description: Define your own statuses per project — name them, group them, reorder them. Kanban columns follow your workflow.

items.title: Git diff folder actions
items.description: Stage, unstage, and discard entire folders at once. Confirmation modals protect against accidental discards.

items.title: Per-provider skill sync
items.description: SKILL.md files sync independently per AI provider — Claude, Codex, Gemini each get their own context.

items.title: Context manager
items.description: Browse, diff, and manually sync project context files across providers from a dedicated panel.

items.title: Per-project processes
items.description: Background processes are now scoped to the active project instead of global.

items.title: Auto-switch project
items.description: Clicking a task tab automatically switches to its project — no more manual selection.

items.title: Browser tab stability
items.description: Fixed a race condition that could lose non-main tab URLs when switching quickly.

items.title: Global file search
items.description: Cmd+Shift+F searches across all files in your project — from any tab.

items.title: Project color tints
items.description: Tabs, task detail, and kanban cards pick up your project's color for quick visual grouping.

items.title: Pinnable usage bars
items.description: Pin or unpin inline API usage bars per provider — keep only what you care about visible.

items.title: In-app changelog
items.description: See what's new every time you update — opens automatically on version upgrade.

items.title: Appearance settings
items.description: Customize font sizes across the app and enable reduced motion for a calmer experience.

items.title: Faster startup
items.description: Parallel splash screen and pre-populated app — visible content on first frame.

items.title: Windows support
items.description: Shell, environment, and git operations stabilized for Windows.

items.title: The Slay CLI
items.description: Create, update, search, and manage tasks without leaving your terminal. Full CRUD, completions, and auto-project scoping.

items.title: Multi-panel home screen
items.description: Open kanban, git, editor, and processes side by side — all on the home tab.

items.title: Tooltips everywhere
items.description: Every panel, button, and control now has helpful tooltip hints.

items.title: Processes panel
items.description: Monitor and manage background tasks — dev servers, builds, watchers — from a dedicated panel.

items.title: Daily leaderboard
items.description: Opt-in anonymous weekly coding streaks. See how you stack up.

items.title: Inline DevTools
items.description: Chromium DevTools embedded right inside the browser panel. No more separate windows.

items.title: Focused panel glow
items.description: A subtle glow shows which panel is currently active — gone when there's only one.

items.title: Terminal injection fix
items.description: Escape sequence responses no longer inject garbage characters into your terminal.

items.title: Crash recovery
items.description: Terminals now auto-recover from crashes with built-in health checks and diagnostics.

items.title: Smarter Cmd+W
items.description: Closes the focused pane first — terminal split, editor file, browser tab — then the task tab.

items.title: Copy URL in browser
items.description: One-click button to copy the current browser panel URL.

items.title: Blocked external launches
items.description: Webviews can no longer silently open apps like Spotify or Zoom.

items.title: Split terminal groups
items.description: Drag terminals into groups and run them side by side within a single task.

items.title: Responsive browser preview
items.description: Test your app across phone, tablet, and desktop viewports — all inline.

items.title: Drag files from Finder
items.description: Drop files and folders straight from Finder into the editor tree.

items.title: Image preview in editor
items.description: Open images directly in the editor panel instead of an external app.

items.title: Priority signal bars
items.description: Kanban cards now show signal-bar indicators so you can spot high-priority tasks at a glance.

items.title: Update toast
items.description: When a new version is downloaded, a toast appears — restart with one click.

items.title: Explode mode
items.description: Grid view of every open task terminal at once. See all your agents working in parallel.
